data.title: happy® Goes Big with New, 48oz Ready-to-Enjoy Cold Brews, Available First at Kroger
data.description: Today, on April 13, 2026, in New York City, happy®, the popular lifestyle coffee brand established by successful entrepreneur Craig Dubitsky (known for founding hello, eos, and method products), announced its launch into the thriving refrigerated coffee market with its inaugural shareable format. This marks the brand's foray into this category, showcasing its innovative approach.

data.title: Willdan Announces Date of First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
data.description: Willdan Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: WLDN) disclosed that it will reveal its financial outcomes for the initial quarter of 2026 post the stock market's closure on Thursday, May 7, 2026. The company is set to conduct its investor conference call at 5:30 p.m. EST / 2:30 p.m. PST subsequent to the report's release. An online live audio webcast of the quarterly investor conference call can be accessed on Willdan’s official website at the specified link.

data.title: In HelloNation, HVAC Experts Sarah & Leonard St. Andrews of Saratoga, NY, Outline Common HVAC Mistakes
data.description: In Saratoga, New York, on April 13, 2026, an article by HelloNation discusses the inadvertent HVAC errors frequently made by homeowners and the potential lasting consequences. The write-up includes advice from Sarah and Leonard St. Andrews from St. Andrews Heating & Cooling.

data.title: Why Oracle Shares Are Trading Higher On Monday?
data.description: Shares of Oracle Corporation (NYSE: ORCL) are on the rise as the sector bounces back from a recent selloff. Investors are reentering the market following sharp declines, spurred by a reevaluation of concerns over valuations and the impact of emerging technologies, such as artificial intelligence. The company introduced new features for Oracle Aconex, targeted at improving project controls for construction teams. These updates streamline project information reviews, aiding teams in managing Inspection and Test Plans (ITP) to enhance quality management in capital projects. Oracle emphasized improved document processes and structured ITP workflows to minimize errors, enhance quality, and provide a complete audit trail. Mark Webster, senior vice president and general manager at Oracle, commented on the advancements.

data.title: Old National Announces Strategic Alignment of Commercial Banking Leadership, Welcomes Chris Doyle
data.description: Today, Old National revealed a new organizational structure within its Commercial Banking division aimed at enhancing leadership effectiveness. This realignment aims to ensure that leadership positions are appropriately matched with their corresponding responsibilities.

data.title: Bespoke Partners Releases First-Ever Best Practices Guide for Assessing AI-Adept Leaders Across Every Executive Function
data.description: In Austin, Texas, a recent guide has been released to assist private equity sponsors and software company boards in evaluating AI leadership. The guide offers a practical framework for assessing AI leadership beyond traditional product and tech roles. This resource aims to provide valuable insights into the importance of effective leadership in the AI sector and help stakeholders make informed decisions. It addresses key considerations and strategies for evaluating AI leadership capabilities in organizations. This initiative is expected to have a significant impact on enhancing leadership practices in the AI industry.

data.title: AiM Future Partners with Metsakuur Company to Commercialize NPU-Integrated Hardware
data.description: A South Korean AI semiconductor IP company, AiM Future, has recently revealed a new partnership with Vision AI company Metsakuur Company. The collaboration aims to create and market hardware products integrated with NPUs, as part of AiM Future's efforts to broaden its offerings in the global edge AI market. This strategic move will allow AiM Future to enhance its position in the industry by providing comprehensive hardware solutions that merge cutting-edge software and hardware technologies.

data.title: XRP Has Been Building This Pattern For 9 Years: Is The Breakout Finally Here?
data.description: XRP is currently trading within a massive 9-year ascending triangle pattern on the monthly chart, while experiencing a significant surge in options volume by 215.78% to reach $3.76 million. The pattern has been consistent since 2017, with XRP repeatedly hitting the upper resistance, facing rejection, and retracing to find support at the rising trendline. Following a recent rejection in August 2025, analysts anticipate a retest of the macro support level ranging between $0.75 and $0.80. This zone is seen as a prime "buy the dip" opportunity before the triangle nears its apex. The Paris Blockchain Week XRP Ledger is set to take center stage during the upcoming Paris Blockchain Week. Analysts suggest that once the 9-year consolidation pattern is broken, a significant historic move can be expected. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.
